text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! I've gone and forgotten what the book's
called!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I remember it was 'bout this big ol' crybaby of a
girl and a puppy, but... Nnnng!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if we'll be able to find it with so little
information... Do you know any books that might
fit that description, Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Let's see... There's Light on a Snowy Night, Little Girl in a Big City, and I think there should be a few other candidates!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there was any snow, but I remember
them runnin' around a field full of flowers. I read
that book to tatters when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well! Let's just hope the name comes to me
later!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um! I-I'm going to look for that book for you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What? Wait, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the bookstore at the mall on my day off to
look for some material I need for work, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bump!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh. You're one of the academy trainers. Sorry I
didn't see you. I was too focused on the
bookshelves.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm looking for a book that has a girl and a
puppy in it... That's all the information I have so
far.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was worth searching the international
releases corner, since it might only be published
and sold overseas.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This is the only large bookstore around that I haven't
checked yet. If it's not here... then I'll look through the
used and smaller stores too! There must be somewhere
that has it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy looks dispirited for a moment,
but rallies herself almost immediately. She must
really want to find that book.
choice_data_list: Is the book important to you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Yes. Well, not to me, strictly speaking. But
to Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She used to read it as a child, so I'm sure it's very
special to her.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've been very shy and withdrawn since I was
young, but then I read my first book, and it
helped me start to expand my world.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I realized everyone is doing their best to live in
this wide world of ours. And before I knew it, I
found myself wanting to step out and join them.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That first book saved me. Even as I grew older
and read many others, that one has always
remained special.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to help Taiki fulfill her wish of
reading the book she loves so much, one more
time.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that would be a good way to pay back
the debt I owe to all the books I've ever read!
choice_data_list: Let me help you look, then.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Really? Th-thank you! If we work together,
we'll be able to get it done in half the time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We search through as many bookstores as we can,
until...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, what do you think? This was the only book
we could find that has a crybaby, a puppy, and a
field of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks! I hate to say it, though, but this
isn't the book I was thinking of.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... I had a feeling this might not be it...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The puppy turns into a dragon and battles flying
ships later in the story, among other things. You
probably would've remembered those parts...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually more impressed that you were able to
find such an outlandish book...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I'm sorry I wasn't able to find your book,
Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Don't sweat it! Thanks a bunch for tryin' so hard!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Maybe my mom remembers. If I get any new info,
I hope you'll help me look for it again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But for now, that book you found sounds mighty
interesting! Since you went and found it and all,
mind if I read it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course not! Go right ahead!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Let's read it together! I'm awfully excited
to read a new story!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm quite interested in that book as well.
Would it be all right if I borrowed it after you two
are finished?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Of course! In fact, why don't we all read it
together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although it wasn't the one they were looking for,
I have a feeling this will become a very special
book for all three of them.
